feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Public cloud HR master data of userid and pernr (person number (PA0105))
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to fetch the data from PA0105(HR master data) table in public cloud tenant. I need pernr and userid fields. I tried with custom cds view it's not working, is there any way to call the PA0105 / any standard APIs/ services? 

I checked Overview | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub I couldn't be able to find anything related to HR Master.

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: Cash Pooling including Interest Calculation
entry.content:
Hi Support,


we would like to implement Cash Pooling in our Public Cloud SAP System. However, we are currently not able to include interest rates / calculation.
Can you please help?

Kind regards
Gaja


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Inquiry/Rework Purchase Order configuration
entry.content:
We are interested in testing out the Inquiry/Rework purchase order functionality, but from reading documentation it is a function that cannot be deactivated if it doesn't work (see blurb below from a community blog post).

We only have a two system landscape and so if we turn it on and it breaks something, we have no way for it to not end up in production when we would need to transport other configuration changes.

Are there any other ways to test this functionality without permanently impacting our systems? The main concern is that we have some BAdI code to allow for approval authority levels and I do not know if that would also require edits to work with the Inquiry/Rework process.

From blog post:

The business function can be switched ON using the configuration step Activate Inquiry Workflow for Purchase Order (SSCUI ID: DIGITS), and is an irreversible switch. Once switched on, it cannot be turned off.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: API to get PDF output form from sales order
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are looking for a solution to retrieve PDF output form from sales order to be used in SAP Commerce Cloud integration. 

This functionality is available for billing documents (Get PDF of Billing Document | SAP Help Portal)  but is there any API or any other method to send "order confirmation form" to SAP Commerce Cloud from S/4HANA Public Cloud?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition API Management SAP Commerce Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: How to stop retriggering of flexible workflow for purchase Order
entry.content:
in the current system, any change retriggers the flexible workflow especially Quantity,Please suggest a solution for this requirement. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: RF verification profile in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I customize in the public Cloud the RF verification profile.

1. In goods receipt process, I set it with (source HU+ destination bin) but the system always want that I also verify the source bin. Even if I put nothing, it always want to verify the source and destination bin. Is it normal?

2. Is there a way to check only the source quantity or destination quantity? There is only 1 field Qty and it checks both.:

Thanks,

Emmanuel.

entry.title: Adapt UI Not Available to Hide 'Confirm All' Button in Starter System
entry.content:
Dear Support,


We have a configuration query within the starter customizing environment, within the Manage Service Orders application (F3571A) there is a button "confirm all" service orders and we want to gray out that button so it is not available, is there any way to achieve this?


Please see the screenshots in the attached file.


Regards,


PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to Post Goods Receipt for a Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am following the test script of Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer (5HP) but I couldn't proceed with the step of Post Goods Receipt with error message below:

No goods receipt possible for purchasing document 4500000857 10

Message no. M7036

I have checked my PO that the Inbound Delivery has appear as a confirmation.

Besides, I ensured the material master and plant data was mapped and I have no issue when carry out another testing of Basic Intercompany Stock Transfer using the same set of data. advanced intercompany

Could you please advise on this?

Link to test script: Process Navigator - SAP for Me

Thank you in advanced!

entry.title: Issue with I_ADDRESS_2 CDS View – No Data Available
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

Today I was asked the following:

 

The standard CDS view I_ADDRESS_2 to fetch detailed address information. Although this CDS view is released and available for use, I am unable to retrieve any data from it.

 

Could you please advise if any additional configuration or activation steps are required for this CDS view to function correctly?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: A custom Transporter ID field is required to be pulled into the Manage Billing Document screen
entry.content:
In some cases, the Transporter ID is represented for the Courier partner, so Business wanted the transport id should be mapped in Invoice so that it can generate IRN , E-way Bill . Currently, the client enters the Transporter ID manually in Invoice . However, the client would like this field to be available directly in the Manage Billing Document screen for specific customers, so they do not have to enter it manually each time.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Perú - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition DemoStarter
entry.content:
Hello Experts

Currently, the SAP DRC solution is active and the legal reports are working. However , I am unable to create new custom reports in the “Define Statutory Reports” app.

My user has all the required roles.

What could be missing?
Is another configuration missing?

#Sap Document and Reporting Compliance

#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Best regards,

Antony Pantoja

entry.title: I want to understand how cost travel from sales order, purchase order;
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I want to understand how the cost travels from the sales order to the purchase order. Are there any resources that you can share with me.

entry.title: Release Standard Price in Valuation Typ 01 (Own Production)
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

we are using the Standard Price Calculation and in addtion we use the Valuation Category "B" for our Material Master Data to differentiate between own and external production. After our Costing Run we release our Standard Price, but our Standard Price is only shown on Header Level and not in Valuation Typ 1.

How can we release our Standard Price in Valuation Typ 1?

Regards Christian

entry.title: App for generating GSTR 3B report
entry.content:
How to generate the GSTR 3B report


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: While debugging in Eclipse, I get an error “no authorization to change variable 'xxxxxxxx'”
entry.content:
I am implementing and testing custom logic on the extension point “MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_HEADER” in S/4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD.
I want to change SY-SUBRC and variable values during debugging in Eclipse, but I get the error

“no authorization to change variable ‘xxxxxxxx’” and cannot change them.
I have assigned the business roles “Extensibility Specialist:
BR_EXTENSIBILITY_SPEC” and “Developer: BR_DEVELOPER” to the PUBLIC CLOUD user ID.
Please let me know if you know of a solution.

entry.title: 免费销售订单，交货单过账时进费用科目
entry.content: 问题：移动类型与销售订单计划行绑定，在哪里配置？ 实际业务场景：客情免费销售订单发货过账时进销售费用科目，客诉免费销售订单发货过账时进主营业务成本科目。 计划实现方案：通过不同的销售订单计划行绑定不同的移动类型，交货单过账时，进不同的科目（销售费用科目、主劳业务成本科目）

entry.title: 免费销售订单，交货单过账时进费用科目
entry.content: 问题：移动类型与销售订单计划行绑定，在哪里配置？ 实际业务场景：客情免费销售订单发货过账时进销售费用科目，客诉免费销售订单发货过账时进主营业务成本科目。 计划实现方案：通过不同的销售订单计划行绑定不同的移动类型，交货单过账时，进不同的科目（销售费用科目、主劳业务成本科目）

entry.title: How to display item-level custom fields without clicking into the sales order item?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Sales order item-level custom fields can be seen by clicking into the sales order item and switching to the "custom fields" tab in the WEBGUI app.

We're wondering if there's a way to show these custom fields in the line item table on the first screen itself, so that it will be easy to see these values.

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: is there any way to call table in public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any way to call the table in public cloud? for my case I need PERNR and Userid fields from PA0105 table. did anyone know CDS/ API or any other ways?

I checked SAP Business Accelerator Hub. I couldn't able to find the fields PERNR and USERID

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: 关于月度结算请求处理
entry.content: 希望通过创建月度结算请求处理作业，实现每月仅自动执行当月结算项目的功能。 但发现当执行结算处理作业时（使用APP：締め請求処理のスケジュール　日本），如果存在下月结算项目的销售单据，系统不仅会处理当月项目，还会同时登记下月的结算处理。 具体如下（5月和6月结算问题）： ① 开票日期5月12日 → 5月结算（正确） ② 开票日期5月15日 → 5月结算（正确） ③ 开票日期5月21日 → 6月结算（问题：本应在6月处理，却在5月就被处理了） 这种情况下，5月和6月的结算处理都会被登记。但我希望③在6月结算单据，应该在6月21日执行的作业中进行结算处理登记。 如果有描述不清楚的地方还请追问。 请问应该怎么进行设置非常感谢！
